svg.title: General FEAT year-script processing sequence
svg.desc: High-level processing stages shared across year-specific FEAT scripts, from parameter entry through reporting and optional comparisons.

svg.text: Coverage basis: common stage structure observed across all hake_1995.py ... hake_2023.py scripts in year_specific/; names and exact branches vary by year.
